heading: Notice of provisions of subchapter
label: 8527 Notice of provisions of subchapter
text: The Secretary shall prescribe a form of application for hospital treatment and domiciliary care which shall include notice of the provisions of this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5227 of this titlesubstituted “Secretary” for “Administrator”.Pub. L. 102–83
